title: Skyblock Tweaks
description: Skyblock Tweaks is a 1.8.9 Hypixel Skyblock Mod, made to make your life easier through its unique features.
body:
![Title Logo](https://i.imgur.com/UloOzQW.png)
     
### Top Features (Images Below)
Auction Flipper

Config and chat integration for auction flipping.

Auction Menu Overlays

Overlays for auction menus.

Item Pricing Info

Data provided by the Skyblock Tweaks API! Shows Lowest BIN, Average BIN, Soonest Auction Price, Average Auction Price, Active Listings, Price Matching, Sales / Day

Dungeon Party GUI

Visual management of your dungeon party.

General Profit Tracker

Tracks all items picked up in inventory or sacks using current market prices on bazaar and auction house.

Zealot & Bruiser Spawn Locations

Shows where and when zealots or bruisers will spawn in The End based off their spawn patterns.

Trash Highlighter

Highlights a customizable list of items marked as 'trash' in inventories, meant for items such as dungeon mob armor.

Floor 2 Spawn Timers

Renders timers showing when the Priest, Warrior, Archer, Mage, Scarf will spawn.

F2, F3, M2, M3 Fire Freeze Timer

Timer showing when to perfectly freeze boss.

Custom Path Tracing /path

Allows for recording of movement paths allowing for easy creation of advanced mining routes.

Quiver Display

Customizable display of your arrows remaining.

Misc Stat Displays

Allows for customizable and moveable displays of your skyblock stats.

Health, Mana, Overflow Mana, Defense, Effective Health, Speed, etc.

Effective Item Area Display

Customizable colors. Works for hyperion, Spirit Scepter, + more items in future.

Gemstone Grinder Overlay

Displaying useful information about gemstone slots, including costs and other details.

Accurate Dwarven Mines Map

Show a map of the dwarven mines, highlighting key points of interest and helping you navigate.

### Commands - **/pft** (*Opens SBT Profit Tracker for all items*) - **/path** (*Create custom recorded paths to save and replay*) - **/jd** \<2\> || **/joindungeon** \ (*Join a dungeon floor from anywhere*) - **/dp** || **/dungeonparty** (*Open SBT's Dungeon Party Gui for managing members*)
### Links - [GitHub](https://github.com/MrFast-js/Skyblock-Tweaks) - [Releases](https://github.com/MrFast-js/Skyblock-Tweaks/releases) - [Pull Requests](https://github.com/MrFast-js/Skyblock-Tweaks/pulls) - [Issues](https://github.com/MrFast-js/Skyblock-Tweaks/issues) - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-tweaks) - [Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/MDw2Q9eBdw)
